summary: Fase 3 testing completed successfully. All new features working: Chatbot AI for clients, email notifications via Brevo, deadlines with notification checkbox, deadline reminder button, welcome email on registration. Backend API tests: 14/14 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all components.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps with the chatbot trigger button, blocking direct clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True or JavaScript click to bypass overlay

passed_tests: ✅ API Health Check - Fiscal Tax Canarie API accessible
✅ Chat Basic Response - Chatbot responds with greeting
✅ Chat Fiscal Question - Chatbot responds to IGIC question
✅ Create Deadline Without Notification - Creates deadline successfully
✅ Create Deadline With Notification - send_notification flag working
✅ Registration Triggers Welcome Email - New client registration calls send_welcome_email
✅ Modelli Tributari List - Returns 8 tax models including IGIC
✅ ClientDetail Notifiche Tab - UI shows send notification form
✅ ClientDetail Scadenze Tab - Shows 'Invia notifica email' checkbox
✅ Deadline Reminder Button - Bell icon visible in deadline list
✅ ChatBot Component - Visible in client dashboard, opens and responds
seed_data_creation: Created test client test_fase3_chat@test.com for chatbot testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 3 features fully tested and working: ChatBot AI (LlmChat with gpt-4o-mini), Email notifications (Brevo SDK), Deadlines with notification checkbox, Reminder button. Email sending depends on valid BREVO_API_KEY configuration. ChatBot depends on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Both keys appear to be configured and working.

chatbot_ai.notes: Responds in Italian, provides fiscal info for Canary Islands

email_notifications.ui: Notifiche tab in ClientDetail with form

deadline_notification_checkbox.ui: 'Invia notifica email al cliente' switch visible

deadline_reminder_button.ui: Bell icon button next to each deadline
